_comment: Real public DoD offices that own money/requirements/programs/transition paths — the named targets for crossing the second valley. Offices & roles only (public org structure), not individuals; reach the current incumbent via the sanctioned 'channel'. Copy to workspace/contacts.json and refine with the specific people you meet. NEVER mass-cold-email these.

sponsors.channel: NavalX / SYSCOM industry days; OPNAV requirements officers via a program office intro
NAVWAR industry day; PEO C4I/Digital intro
NAVWAR Industry Day; SBIR topic Q&A; SAM RFI
NAVAIR industry day; SBIR Phase III sole-source if you hold a Phase II
ONR long-range BAA; engage the cognizant program officer with a white paper
sponsors.notes: S&T bridge dollars; relationships pull into POM.

sponsors.channel: Modern Day Marine; MCWL experiments; MCSC industry day
MCWL experimentation campaigns; industry days; Modern Day Marine

sponsors.office: Marine Corps Systems Command (MCSC) / PEO Land Systems
sponsors.channel: MCSC Advance Planning Briefings to Industry (APBI); SBIR
Army Network CFT engagements; C5ISR industry day; SBIR Q&A
PEO IEW&S industry day; SBIR Phase III

sponsors.office: PEO CS&CSS — Combat Support & Combat Service Support
sponsors.channel: Army Sustainment industry day; SBIR
Relevant CFT (Network, etc.) engagement; xTech
sponsors.notes: Writes/validates Army requirements — get here before the demo.

sponsors.channel: xTech prize competitions (sanctioned entry point)
sponsors.notes: Competition path into Army program offices.

sponsors.office: AFLCMC — Air Force Life Cycle Management Center
sponsors.channel: AFLCMC industry days; SBIR Phase III sole-source
sponsors.notes: Where USAF programs of record are managed.

sponsors.channel: AFRL BAA; engage the technical POC / core tech area lead
Open Topic SBIR; secure a Customer Memo from the using unit; TACFI/STRATFI bridge
sponsors.notes: The Customer Memo IS the resource-sponsor signal.

sponsors.channel: SSC industry day; SpEC OTA via NSTXL
DIU Commercial Solutions Openings; engage the portfolio area lead
sponsors.notes: CSO → OT with 4022(f) follow-on production = built-in scale path.

sponsors.channel: Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace (sanctioned, video-pitch submission)
sponsors.notes: DoD-wide AI acquisition marketplace + ATO reciprocity story.

sponsors.office: APFIT — Accelerate Procurement & Fielding of Innovative Tech (OUSD A&S)
sponsors.channel: Component nominates your effort to the annual APFIT call
sponsors.notes: Procurement-dollar bridge across the valley — needs a component sponsor to nominate.

sponsors.channel: Office-wide BAA; engage the PM at a Proposers Day
sponsors.notes: High-ceiling S&T; PM relationship is the lever.

sponsors.channel: TRANSCOM industry engagement; Joint Deployment & Distribution Enterprise (JDDE)
DLA industry day; DLA R&D BAA
sponsors.notes: DLA SBIR topics (e.g. NV006/NV007) live here.

sponsors.channel: SOFWERX events; SOF Week; SOCOM CSO
sponsors.notes: Fast SOF adoption path; SOFWERX is the sanctioned front door.
